release_notes: Prompting fixes. Your chosen Prompting model now sticks after you close and reopen the app (it was silently resetting to the default). Added a completeness guard: if a model summarizes your dictation instead of expanding it, Talkty automatically retries a stronger model so no detail is dropped — which also makes cheaper/faster models safe to pick. Gemini 3.5 Flash is now the top automatic fallback.
